mano_cua.result_summary: 页面因SSR错误渲染空白，无法直接观察通知组件。mano-cua通过DevTools分析CSS发现：左侧图标.Notivue__icon margin-left为var(--nv-spacing)，右侧关闭按钮.Notivue__close margin为0、padding为calc(var(--nv-spacing)/2)，左右间距不对称（左=nv-spacing，右=nv-spacing/2）。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Now I can see the CSS content more clearly as the text has wrapped (zoom is reset to 100%). The CSS is now displayed in a word-wrapped format which makes it much easier to read! Key findings: .Notivue__icon has margin: var(--nv-spacing) 0 var(--nv-spacing) var(--nv-spacing) (left margin = nv-spacing). .Notivue__close has margin:0 and padding: calc(var(--nv-spacing) / 2). Left spacing = var(--nv-spacing), right spacing = var(--nv-spacing)/2 — these are NOT equal, confirming asymmetric icon margins.
